creator: hlh@restart.be
text:
Created attachment 228321
the gdm log

Staring gdm I got in /var/log/gdm/*greeting.log (see attachment) and the display 'something go wrong'

If I replace
gnome-session-40.1.1, gnome-shell-41.0, gnome-shell-extensions-41.0 and mutter-41.0

by
gnome-session-3.38.0_1, gnome-shell-3.36.6_7, gnome-shell-extensions-3.36.3 and mutter-3.36.6_1

Everything return to normal.
